name: Rodriguez Quinceañera — Emerald Hall Oct 2026

name: Cookie & Dessert Table Designs
description: Decorated cookie designs and dessert table layouts for Quinceañeras and milestone events. Fondant work, royal icing, and display ideas.

description: Uplighting, ceiling drape, and string light setups for ballroom and banquet hall events. Inspiration for vendor conversations.

name: Mexican & Latin Recipes
description: Home cooking. Pozole, carnitas, tamales, and everything else I make for the family on weekends.

name: Home Decor — Apartment Ideas
description: Practical home decor for a Las Vegas apartment. Dark wood tones, warm lighting, functional furniture.

name: Woodworking Projects
description: Furniture builds, box making, and weekend shop projects. Mostly things I want to build when I have more than a Saturday afternoon.

name: Centerpiece & Floral Inspiration
description: Centerpiece designs for Quinceañeras and event tables. Tall arrangements, low clusters, and mixed floral styles.

name: Client Mood Boards — Archive
description: Private archive of completed client event mood boards. Past Quinceañera and milestone events.
